title: Koleston Perfect Fact Sheet
notes: Official Wella Professionals product fact sheet. Use regional technical manuals where available.

title: Koleston Perfect Usage Guidelines
notes: Official Wella Professionals leaflet with selected mixing guidance and product usage notes.

title: Blondor Usage Booklet
notes: Older official Wella booklet. Lightener products vary by region and product generation, so use as partial reference only.

title: Blondor Fact Sheet
notes: Official Wella Professionals Blondor product fact sheet with product-specific developer ranges, mixing ratios and maximum development times.

title: Majirel Color Chart 2025
notes: Official L'Oreal Professionnel US shade chart with mixing ratio, processing time and developer lift guidance.

title: Majirel Technical Guide
notes: Professional supplier-hosted technical guide. Treat grey coverage details as partial unless confirmed against current regional official material.

title: Blond Studio Technical Sheet
notes: Official technical sheet, but Blond Studio has multiple products and techniques; keep first version as partial.

title: IGORA ROYAL Technical Manual
notes: Professional supplier-hosted manual. Use as partial until checked against the current official regional Schwarzkopf manual.

title: IGORA ROYAL Official Product Page
notes: Official Schwarzkopf Professional product page confirms current portfolio and coverage claims, but does not expose complete core formulation rules.

title: IGORA ROYAL ABSOLUTES Official Product Page
notes: Official Schwarzkopf Professional page with Absolutes mixing ratio, developer guidance, development time and white hair coverage notes.

title: IGORA ROYAL ABSOLUTES Technical Manual
notes: Official Henkel DAM-hosted technical manual linked from the Schwarzkopf Professional Absolutes page.

title: BLONDME Service Manual
notes: Brand media-hosted BLONDME service manual. Product variants and region-specific developer limits require professional confirmation.

title: BLONDME Premium Lightener 9+ Official Product Page
notes: Official Schwarzkopf Professional page linking current BLONDME service manual and technical booklet.

title: BLONDME Clay Lightener Official Product Page
notes: Official Schwarzkopf Professional page confirming BLONDME Clay Lightener use case, lift claim and product positioning.

title: BLONDME Service Manual
notes: Official Henkel DAM-hosted BLONDME service manual linked from current Schwarzkopf Professional BLONDME product pages.

title: BLONDME Technical Booklet
notes: Official Henkel DAM-hosted BLONDME technical booklet linked from current Schwarzkopf Professional BLONDME product pages.

title: BLONDME Technical Manual 2021
notes: Professional supplier-hosted BLONDME manual. Treat clay and premium lightener data as partial seed rules.

title: SOPHISTONE Permanent Color
notes: Official Milbon USA page with permanent and high lift mixing ratio, developer and processing time.

title: Milbon Sophistone Permanent Color Chart
notes: Official Milbon USA PDF color chart used as supporting source.

title: Paul Mitchell Brand Page
notes: Canbran website confirms the Paul Mitchell brand category, but product-specific color technical rules are not exposed on this page.

title: The Demi 幻彩染系列
notes: Public Canbran campaign page for The Demi. Useful for service positioning, not enough for verified technical rules.

title: Professional Salon Hair Color & Hair Dye
notes: Official Paul Mitchell professional color portfolio page. It confirms color-service positioning but does not expose full product-line rules.

title: Getting Started with Color XG
notes: Official Paul Mitchell education page confirms Color XG positioning, gray coverage/natural/cool-tone education and that the course covers mixing guidelines; detailed rules are not publicly exposed.

title: XG Family Product Knowledge
notes: Official Paul Mitchell course page confirms Color XG family product knowledge, 100% gray coverage positioning and formulation/mixing education; full technical content requires course access.

title: Color XG Permanent Cream Hair Color
notes: Professional supplier page with public directions for Color XG mixing ratio, developer volumes and processing times. Use as partial until confirmed against Paul Mitchell or Canbran official technical manual.

title: The Demi Product Knowledge
notes: Official Paul Mitchell education page confirms The Demi as no-ammonia demi-permanent hair color and references formulation/mixing techniques; full ratios require course/manual access.

title: The Demi Pre-Bonded 5-Minute Toners Product Knowledge
notes: Official education page confirms The Demi Pre-Bonded 5-Minute Toners are for saturated toning, neutralization and color enhancement on levels 8-10 in 5 minutes. Treat as a variant-specific note, not a general The Demi timing rule.

title: The Demi by Paul Mitchell
notes: Professional supplier page with public directions for The Demi equal-parts Processing Liquid mixing and up-to-20-minute application workflows. Use as partial until confirmed against Paul Mitchell or Canbran official technical manual.

title: Processing Liquid
notes: Professional supplier page identifies Paul Mitchell Processing Liquid as a low-volume processing liquid for PM Shines and The Demi. Use as partial supporting data only.

title: How-To: Cover or Enhance Gray Hair
notes: Official Paul Mitchell article distinguishes permanent color for full gray coverage from demi-permanent color for gray blending/enhancement.

title: Paul Mitchell The Color 10 Product Knowledge
notes: Official education page confirms The Color 10 slight lift, up to 100% gray coverage and 10-minute positioning. Full mixing rules and Canbran Taiwan availability still require manual verification.

title: The Color 10 Permanent Hair Color
publisher: CosmoProf Canada / John Paul Mitchell Systems
notes: Professional supplier Canada page with public directions for The Color 10 1:1.5 mixing, 20V Creme Developer and fast gray-service positioning. Not enough to verify Taiwan Canbran product availability or full shade-family rules.

title: Paul Mitchell Blonding
notes: Official Paul Mitchell Pro blonding page confirms current public blonding portfolio and toning direction, including Pre-Bonded Lightener and The Demi Pre-Bonded 5-Minute Toners. Skylight was not visible on this public page during review.

title: BLONDE Pre-Bonded Lightener
notes: Professional supplier page gives Pre-Bonded Lightener ratio range, on-scalp developer cap, no-heat warning and maximum processing time. Keep partial because ratio is a range and Taiwan Canbran availability is not confirmed.

title: Skylight Hand-Painting Clay Lightener
notes: Professional supplier page with Skylight positioning and public-use guidance. Verify against current Paul Mitchell or Canbran technical manual before upgrading.

title: Canbran Paul Mitchell public special-cosmetics license references
publisher: Public data mirror of Taiwan special-purpose cosmetics records
notes: Historical public-license reference showing Canbran applicant records for Paul Mitchell color-related products. Dates shown must be rechecked against the current official Taiwan regulatory database before any verified claim.

title: edol Series
notes: Official LebeL edol series page confirms edol color, edol qon, edol yoyo, edol Oxy 6%, Oxy 2%, Oxy AC1%, bleach and salon-technician positioning. Full technical use rules require official manual confirmation.

title: edol Product Item
notes: Official item page confirms edol is salon-technician-only, 80 g, with 81 colors plus lightener and clear. Public page does not expose full processing and shade-family rules.

title: edol Oxy 6%
notes: Official item page confirms edol Oxy 6% as peroxide second agent for edol. Developer selection rules remain partial without the full technical manual.

title: edol Oxy 2%
notes: Official item page confirms edol Oxy 2% as peroxide second agent for edol. Developer selection rules remain partial without the full technical manual.

title: edol bleach
notes: Official item page confirms edol bleach is salon-technician-only powder bleach and includes persulfate-related precautions. Full bleach ratio, scalp limits and processing rules require manual verification.

title: edol qon Product Item
notes: Official item page confirms edol qon as a gray-hair color line with 61 colors and 120 g format. Full gray coverage formula rules require technical manual confirmation.

title: edol Color Line-up
notes: Official public PDF color line-up includes edol ratio references such as standard edol 1:1, level 15 1:2 and LT-EX 1:3 with edol Oxy. It does not provide all conditions needed for verified rule output.

title: MATERIA Series
notes: Official LebeL MATERIA series page confirms MATERIA, MATERIA mu, MATERIA G and OXY developer product lines. Public page does not expose complete technical rules.

title: MATERIA Product Item
notes: Official item page confirms MATERIA is salon-technician-only, 80 g, with 100 colors plus lighteners. Full processing and shade-family rules require manual confirmation.

title: MATERIA mu Product Item
notes: Official item page confirms MATERIA mu is a low-alkaline type, 80 g, with 67 colors plus clear. Full processing rules require manual confirmation.

title: MATERIA G Product Item
notes: Official item page confirms MATERIA G as a gray color line, 120 g, with 84 colors plus clear. Full white-hair coverage ratios and conditions require manual confirmation.

title: MATERIA / MATERIA mu Color Chart
notes: Official public PDF color chart includes MATERIA 1+3 with MATERIA OXY W and MATERIA mu 1+1 with MATERIA OXY W 3%. Keep partial until full technical manual conditions are modeled.

title: MATERIA G Color Chart
notes: Official public PDF color chart includes MATERIA G 1+1 with MATERIA OXY W. Keep partial until full gray coverage conditions and processing rules are modeled.

title: Generic Education Rules Policy
notes: Generic education rules are not brand official rules and must not be shown as verified.
